heading: Electromagnetic spectrum superiority implementation plan
label: 500d Electromagnetic spectrum superiority implementation plan
notes: Amendments2024— renumbered , relating to an electromagnetic spectrum superiority implementation plan, as this section.Pub. L. 118–159section 504 of this title
amendments: Amendments2024— renumbered , relating to an electromagnetic spectrum superiority implementation plan, as this section.Pub. L. 118–159section 504 of this title

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: The Chief Information Officer of the Department of Defense shall be responsible for oversight of the electromagnetic superiority implementation plan.
The implementation plan in effect as of the date of the report, noting any revisions from the preceding plan.
A statement of the elements of the implementation plan that have been achieved.
For each element that has been achieved, an assessment of whether the element is having its intended effect.
For any element that has not been achieved, an assessment of progress made in achieving the element, including a description of any obstacles that may hinder further progress.

For any element that has been removed from the implementation plan, a description of the reason for the removal of the element and an assessment of the impact of not pursuing achievement of the element.
Such additional matters as the Chief Information Officer considers appropriate.

children.heading: .—Electromagnetic Superiority Implementation Plan Defined
children.label: c .—Electromagnetic Superiority Implementation Plan Defined
children.text: In this section, the term “electromagnetic superiority implementation plan” means the Electromagnetic Superiority Implementation Plan signed by the Secretary of Defense on , and any successor plan.July 15, 2021
